title: Landscape Architectural Services

narrative.executive_view: Landscape Architectural Services has AI productivity potential in production and administration, but professional accountability, client judgment and field work remain valuable. [S1]
narrative.how_ai_changes_work: AI assists drafting, visualization, specifications, proposals and coordination; responsible control, site judgment and liability remain human.
narrative.value_capture: Project and percentage fees eventually reprice as effort falls, so operators retain only part of savings.
narrative.adoption_timing: Industry evidence shows broad interest but uneven maturity; effective adoption remains below 50% and t50 is positive. [S1]
narrative.consolidation_economics: The supplied target count supports buyability, but direct small-firm M&A multiple evidence was not reopened; multiples are cautious estimates.
narrative.terminal_demand: Demand is pressured: practice acts protect some work, but title-act and contractor/design exemptions leave discretionary work exposed. [S2][S3]
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: The supplied 5413 role mix is engineering-dominated and is a material proxy mismatch; project-cycle, fee deflation and principal portability remain key risks.

sources.title: Deltek Clarity A&E 2026
sources.what_it_supports: Deltek reports broad AI use/plans but immature governance and ROI.

sources.title: ASLA landscape architecture licensing
sources.what_it_supports: ASLA distinguishes title acts from practice acts.

sources.title: ASLA Snapshot: Landscape Architecture Laws
sources.what_it_supports: State-law snapshot documents practice/title act differences and exemptions for contractors/designers.

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541320 ($2,653,798,071) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541320 ($5,788,521,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $206,548 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541320); class <5: 3,549 firms, avg revenue/firm $379,051 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $59,321 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 800 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,193,496 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $186,782 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 390 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,621,638 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $410,286 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 256 firms, avg revenue/firm $6,121,246 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $957,975 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 33 firms, avg revenue/firm $23,646,333 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,700,651 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 13 firms, avg revenue/firm $9,128,077 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,428,544 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 46
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%

ai_replaceable_share.rationale: AI targets production and administrative tasks rather than accountable design/field work.
caveats: 5413 parent role mix is a proxy.

cross_checks.uplift_vs_A_consistent: Moderate task exposure and positive t50 reflect uneven mature implementation.

terminal_value.justification: Licensing preserves some accountable work but exemptions and AI pressure the production layer.

cross_checks.no_proxy_confirmed: No; parent 5413 occupation data are engineering contaminated.
cross_checks.pricing_model_deflation: Historic-effort fee norms and competitive bids pass through part of production savings.

dataset_mismatch.description: 5413 parent role mix is not code-specific.

reviewer_note: All score-driving URLs were reopened; no direct small-firm multiple series was found.
